ai_disclosure_text: This {media_type} has been edited and depicts speech or conduct that falsely appears to be authentic or truthful.
ai_disclosure_scope: Only applies to communications depicting a candidate within 60 days of a primary or 90 days of a general election, where the person knows or has reckless disregard that the depicted conduct is false.
